integrity_notes: tok/s + swap MEASURED per model on the 8 GB box; a non-OK row is the real memory wall (swap-death / load failure), captured verbatim.

8B (4.9 GB) on an 8 GB machine swap-thrashes: a 64-token request that finished in 6.5 s on the 3B did NOT return within the 600 s client timeout. The practical model-size ceiling on this rig is the 3B; the popular 8B is already past the wall.
